Headline: Senior Software Development Engineer @ Amazon
Summary: Hi I'm Eric, a Senior Software Development Engineer and AI Driven Leader in New Jersey.  I have experience engineering and refining business process management solutions for IT projects. I also automate solutions using APIs to cut out predictable and repetitive tasks. This helps the enterprise save time and make smart business decisions.  Right now I am leading a team of highly skilled engineers in adopting AI tools in everyday development. This includes everything from crafting prompts for Bedrock to chaining agents together with LangChain and LangGraph.  My go-to programming languages are Python, MySQL, PowerShell, Java, HTML, CSS, and JavaScript. I have a BS in Software Development and enjoy learning new things every day!
